option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Unified Database Migration - Complete
## Overview All legacy database calls have been redirected to use the new unified **`AppDatabase`** that combines chats, contacts, and messages as single tables in one database file.
## New Files Created
### 1. **`AppDatabase.kt`** (`room/new_db/`) - Single unified Room database combining all three entity types - Tables: `chats_table`, `contacts_table`, `messages_table` - Lazy-loads via singleton pattern at `app_database` - Automatically runs migration on first initialization
### 2. **`AppRepository.kt`** (`room/new_db/`) - Unified repository with three logical sections: - **Chats** operations (queries, updates, deletes) - **Contacts** operations (queries, updates, deletes) - **Messages** operations (queries, updates, deletes) - `migrateFromLegacyDatabases(context)` function that: - Reads all data from legacy `ChatsDatabase`, `ContactsDatabase`, `MessagesDatabase` - Inserts into unified AppDatabase - Deletes legacy database files - Uses SharedPreferences flag to run exactly once
## Updated Files (13 total)
### Core Framework 1. **`RepositoryProvider.kt`** - Added `appRepository(context)` factory; updated `messagesRepository()` to use `AppDatabase` 2. **`DataManager.kt`** - Redirected `getChatsRepo()` and `cleanAllDatabases()` to use `AppDatabase`; added `getAppRepo()` convenience method
### Utilities 3. **`UsersUtils.kt`** - All DB calls redirected: `addNewUser()`, `removeUser()`, `saveBittelUserSOS()`, etc. 4. **`LocationUtils.kt`** - All DB calls redirected: `init()`, `saveBittelUserLocation()`, `createNewContact()`, `saveLocationSent()` 5. **`GroupsUtils.kt`** - Redirected `addAllGroups()` and `resetGroupIds()` 6. **`FileUtils.kt`** - Updated `exportAllDatabasesToCsv()` to use unified AppDatabase 7. **`DemoDataUtil.kt`** - Updated `setupDatabases()` to use `AppRepository`
### Audio/PTT 8. **`PlayerUtils.kt`** - Redirected `chatsRepository` property and methods `saveBittelMessageToDatabase()`, `saveBittelPTTAiToDatabase()` 9. **`WavRecorder.kt`** - Redirected `updateAudioReceived()`
### Stardust Package Handlers 10. **`StardustPackageHandler.kt`** - Redirected `handlePTTAI()` and `handlePTT()` 11. **`StardustInitConnectionHandler.kt`** - Redirected `buildAddGroupsPayload()` 12. **`FileReceiver.kt`** - Redirected `saveToMessages()` 13. **`ContactsDao.kt`** - Added `suspend fun readAllContacts()` for migration support
## Migration Flow
When `RepositoryProvider.appRepository(context)` is called for the first time:
``` 1. Create AppDatabase singleton (combines all 3 tables) 2. Create AppRepository 3. Launch background coroutine calling migrateFromLegacyDatabases() 4. Migration: - Opens ChatsDatabase → reads all rows → inserts to AppDatabase - Opens ContactsDatabase → reads all rows → inserts to AppDatabase - Opens MessagesDatabase → reads all rows → inserts to AppDatabase - context.deleteDatabase("chats_database") - context.deleteDatabase("contacts_database") - context.deleteDatabase("messages_database") - Sets SharedPreferences flag so it never runs again 5. Return AppRepository singleton for all future calls ```
## Zero Breaking Changes
- Old `ChatsRepository`, `ContactsRepository`, `MessagesRepository` classes still exist and work - Callers can gradually migrate to new `AppRepository` - `DataManager.getAppRepo(context)` is the recommended single entry point for all new code
## Files with Remaining Old DB Calls (Intentional)
- **`AppRepository.kt`** - `migrateFromLegacyDatabases()` intentionally reads from legacy databases during migration
## Files Verified (Zero compile errors, only pre-existing warnings)
✅ RepositoryProvider.kt ✅ DataManager.kt ✅ UsersUtils.kt ✅ LocationUtils.kt ✅ GroupsUtils.kt ✅ FileUtils.kt ✅ DemoDataUtil.kt ✅ PlayerUtils.kt ✅ WavRecorder.kt ✅ StardustPackageHandler.kt ✅ StardustInitConnectionHandler.kt ✅ FileReceiver.kt ✅ ContactsDao.kt ✅ AppDatabase.kt ✅ AppRepository.kt
## Usage Examples
### New unified API (recommended): ```kotlin val appRepo = DataManager.getAppRepo(context)
// Chats appRepo.addChat(chatItem) appRepo.readChat(chatId)
// Contacts appRepo.addContact(contact) appRepo.getChatContactById(userId)
// Messages appRepo.saveMessage(context, messageItem) appRepo.readAllMessagesByChatId(chatId)
// Combined appRepo.clearAllData() ```
### Old API still works (for backwards compatibility): ```kotlin DataManager.getChatsRepo(context) DataManager.getMessagesRepo(context) ```
